Custom Bank Banner Materials for Financial Marketing Campaigns

Due to the latest shipping regulations, all vinyl banners that exceed 8 feet in both directions will be folded for shipping. If you do not want your banners folded, please contact us to get a custom freight quote.

Make the most of your financial marketing campaigns with eye-catching custom bank banners. From branch promotions and loan advertisements to grand openings and community events, we help financial institutions improve visibility and make an unforgettable first impression with professionally designed custom bank banners.

Here at Banners.com, our goal is to deliver a bank banner that you're proud to display at your financial institution. That's why we take great care in our craft and work closely with you to bring your banking marketing vision to reality. One of the ways we do this is through strict quality checks. Our team includes seasoned graphic designers and production experts who have been with us for many years. They're deeply familiar with the nuances of the vinyl banner industry and are dedicated to collaborating to ensure you receive a tailor-made bank banner for your financial institution.

We offer a wide selection of custom bank banner materials and signage options, including sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50', unlimited design options in our online designer, and you can choose production time to ensure your bank banner is delivered when you need it for your financial marketing campaign.

Did we answer all your questions?

If not, please give us a call at (320) 391-5300, and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you with your bank banner project.

Looking for something more specific? Custom sizing and specialty applications are available upon request! Ideal for special financial marketing projects, unique sizes, and larger quantity bank banner orders.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Bank Banner Material for Financial Institution Displays

Six Customizable Bank Banner Materials

Your bank banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that pop. All bank banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.

Exact sizes of bank banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex., a 5' bank banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your bank banner needs to be precise for your financial institution display, please ask your customer service representative to discuss your specific application.

13 oz Matte Vinyl Bank Banners
Our high-quality 13 oz matte vinyl banner material is our most popular bank banner material. It has a low shine and rich color gamut perfect for financial institution branding.

13 oz Gloss Vinyl Bank Banners
Our high-quality 13 oz gloss vinyl banner material has a high shine to it that produces vibrant, crisp colors and graphics to give your bank banner a high-end professional look.

18 oz Vinyl Bank Banners
Our extra heavy-duty matte 18 oz vinyl banner material is our toughest material for bank banners. It has a low luster, blockout coating for extra durability and print quality perfect for outdoor financial institution displays.

Mesh Bank Banners
Made with 8 oz PVC polyester mesh material that has a criss-crossed breathable scrim that allows a 37% airflow. Mesh bank banners are ideal for outdoor and windy conditions at financial institutions.

Fabric Bank Banners
Made with a premium nylon/polyester blend material called Banner Soft. This fabric is ideal for indoor bank displays and has a low shine that produces a high-end look and feel for financial institutions.

Adhesive Bank Banners
Standard Tack Vinyl: Standard tack vinyl can be used both indoors and outdoors for bank applications, with an outdoor lifespan of 3 to 5 years when properly installed and maintained.

Extreme Tack Vinyl: Extreme Tack vinyl is white calendered vinyl material with a high tack adhesive that is specifically designed to adhere to low energy surfaces at financial institutions.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Bank Banner Finishing Options for Professional Installation

Vinyl Bank Banner Finishing Options

Hems & Grommets

These are a one inch fold, heat-welded hem with grommets typically added every 2–4 feet for bank banner installation.

Reinforced Hems

A thick, weblike material is heat-welded to the perimeter to provide additional reinforcement for bank banners.

Reinforced Corners

A triangular piece of vinyl is applied to improve strength and durability in the corners of bank banners.

Pole Pockets

A sleeve added to allow for a dowel or pole to run through for support during bank banner installation.

Heat Welded Hems & Grommets
Hems consist of one inch of the vinyl bank banner material folded over and heated together to form a strong hem. We recommend hems for all bank banners to increase durability during financial institution displays.

You will have the following options when selecting hems and grommets for your bank banner:

Top and Bottom Only Hems – Standard finishing option for bank banners.
All Four Sides Hems – All 4 sides of the bank banner will be heat welded and grommeted.

Pole Pockets for Bank Banners
Pole pockets consist of 2, 3, or 4 inches of material wrapped around the sides, top, or bottom of the bank banner.

  • 2" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 3/4" in diameter
  • 3" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/4" in diameter
  • 4" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/2" in diameter

By selecting pole pockets, there will be no increase in the finished size of your bank banner.

Pole pockets are not available with reinforced hems or corners for bank banners.

Reinforced Corners for Bank Banners
Reinforced corners provide extra strength and are grommeted to each corner of the bank banner for enhanced durability during financial institution installations.

Reinforced Hems for Bank Banners
Reinforced hems are a PVC-coated webbing which increases the strength of the bank banner for long-term financial institution displays.

You cannot have reinforced hems with pole pockets on bank banners.

Double-Sided Bank Banner Finishing
We can finish double-sided bank banners up to 150 square feet. Larger sizes require a custom quote for financial institution projects.

To learn more, visit our vinyl banner finishing options page.

We do not recommend wind slits in bank banners. For more information, visit our wind slit banners page.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Bank Banner Production & Turnaround Times

We provide flexible production time ranges for you to choose from for your bank banner project. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your financial marketing timeline, our bank banner production times range from one to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your bank banner for your financial institution campaign.

1 Business Day Priority:
Financial marketing timelines can be tight. That's why we offer this zippy one day turnaround option for urgent bank banner projects.

  • Bank banner orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency/same day rushes may be available for bank banners. Please contact customer service for more information.
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time for bank banners.
  • Turnaround starts once file upload is complete and approval is given if a proof is requested for your bank banner.

2 Business Days Express:
Have an extra day, but still need your bank banners quickly? The express option is ideal for financial institution marketing campaigns.

3 Business Days Standard:
This is our most popular fast turnaround option for bank banners. Free and speedy for most custom financial institution orders.

5 Business Days Saver:
If you're not in a rush with your bank banner project, you can save money by choosing our 5-Day Saver option for financial institution campaigns.

All production time notes apply to bank banner orders as listed above.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Bank Banner Payment & Ordering Options

Payment for Bank Banner Orders

All bank banners must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover cards for bank banner orders. We also accept checks for financial institution orders, which must be received before your bank banner order is put into production. For more information on check orders for bank banners, see this article on our blog.

We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your bank banner order for your financial institution.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Custom Bank Banner Delivery

General Shipping Guidelines for Bank Banners

If you have any questions about shipping your bank banner, please contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified at the time of ordering, your bank banner order will be shipped via UPS Ground. We offer a 1–3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States for bank banner delivery.

You will receive a tracking number once your bank banner package has been shipped.

Shipping prices for bank banners are determined by the weight and destination of the package. Additional shipping charges apply to large bank banner orders.

After bank banner products have been shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund the bank banner cost if UPS or any other shipping company has a delay in your package.

Delays due to natural disasters or anything beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds for bank banner orders. If the bank banner product is damaged in shipping, the damaged goods must be returned, and then a replacement bank banner will be sent.

Lost bank banner packages will be replaced after the shipping company confirms loss. This generally takes 7–10 business days after the initial scheduled delivery for bank banner orders.

International Shipping Notes for Bank Banners:
For international bank banner shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS for bank banner orders.

Shipping Methods for Bank Banners

We offer the following shipping methods for bank banner delivery:

  • Standard (3–5 Business Days)
  • Three Day (3 Business Days)
  • Two Day (2 Business Days)
  • Overnight (1 Business Day)
  • UPS Overnight AM

Economy Shipping for Bank Banners
If choosing economy shipping for your bank banner, please add additional postal information such as P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery.

Using economy shipping can also add an additional 5–10 days depending on destination for bank banner delivery.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Bank Banner Artwork Requirements for Professional Printing

Artwork Guidelines for Bank Banners

The file that prints best for bank banners is .eps converted to outline. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files for bank banner projects. If you are unsure of the quality of your files for your bank banner, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you.

Artwork/Order Proofs for Bank Banners
If you would like to double-check your bank banner order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your bank banner order proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork and a summary of your order (including pricing), as well as your billing and shipping information. Please note that if you request a proof for your bank banner, we will not send your order into production until you have sent your approval.

Color Match Proof System for Bank Banners
If your bank banner project is color critical for your financial institution branding, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific bank banner project. For more details about color matching for bank banners, please contact a customer service representative.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Professional Bank Banners for Your Financial Marketing Campaign

High-quality, high-resolution, and full-color bank banners take your financial institution marketing to the next level. At banners.com, we offer all that and more, like quick delivery and outdoor durability perfect for banking applications.

We have lots of bank banner templates available for you to customize online. Whether you are looking for banners to advertise your free checking or savings accounts, special loan offers or online banking services, you can create a custom bank banner here! You can also upload your own files or work with a graphic designer who will create something for you based on your financial institution's requirements.

Our bank banners are rated for indoor and outdoor use and are printed on durable 13 oz scrim vinyl. We also have flags and fabric banners available for financial institutions. Window perf is a great way to advertise for your bank as well.

Request a quote and start your bank banner design today.
